title: Scraggy and Mimikyu
overview: On the hunt for some tasty Poké Beans, Scraggy runs into a peculiar Pokémon—Mimikyu! Mimikyu wants to be friends, but Scraggy only wants snacks. Watch as they chase each other toward a potential friendship.

title: The Pancham Who Wants to Be a Hero
overview: Pancham dreams of becoming a hero, so it trains every day. When some people and Pokémon are in trouble, does Pancham have what it takes to be the hero they need?

title: Blossom’s Dream
overview: Blossom’s goal is to become a Pokémon League Champion! During a trip into the forest, she has a chance encounter with a Pokémon who will test her dreams.

title: Wait for Me, Magikarp!
overview: A loyal Magikarp wants nothing more than to make a friend.

title: The Slugma-Powered Home
overview: Spend a cozy, snowy day in a house full of friendly Pokémon.

title: Help! I've Turned into a Gengar
overview: Afterschool activities get more interesting when a mysterious Gengar stirs up some fun.

title: Snorunt's Summer Vacation
overview: A hot summer day suddenly turns into a snowy wonderland for three friends. Could a Pokémon have something to do with it?

title: Jigglypuff's Song
overview: Jigglypuff is sad because its song isn’t like the songs of other Jigglypuff. Will it be able to find the right melody with a friend’s help?

title: Tag Game in the Safari with Lucky?!
Bonding with Kangaskhan
overview: Yurado dreams of being a commentator just like her mom. As her mom works, Yurado makes a diorama with Kangaskhan in the next room—and then something mega occurs!

title: Another Day with Gardevoir
overview: Yugo dreams of the time he spent training to be a champion with Gardevoir, his partner Pokémon, but now he’s too tired and busy with work. However, some friendships and dreams are just too mega to be forgotten...

title: Sing! Dance! Altaria!
overview: The story of a Swablu that loves to sing but nobody gives it attention until it goes into a town and meets a trainer named Kamina who wants to sing.
